title: Rights and Permissions
text: RIGHTS AND PERMISSIONS “Into the Quantum Realm” is taken from Tryptamine Palace by James Oroc, published by Park Street Press, a division of Inner Traditions International, 2009. All rights reserved. www.innertraditions.com . Reprinted with permission of the publisher. “Do You See What I See? Memoirs of a Blind Biker” by Russell Targ is adapted from his book of the same name (Hampton Roads, 2008). Reprinted with permission of the publisher. “Syllable and Sound” by Michael Taussig was first published in Trigger93: The Word , volume 1 (December 17, 2010). Reprinted with permission of the publisher. “Does Consciousness Depend on the Brain?” Chris Carter was first published in his book Science and the Near-Death Experience: How Consciousness Survives Death (Inner Traditions, 2010). All rights reserved. www.innertraditions.com . Reprinted with permission of the publisher. “Layers of Illusion: Manifesting Astral Body, Dream, and Lucidity” by Anthony Peake was first published in his book The Out of Body Experience—The History and Science of Astral Travel (Duncan Baird Publishers, 2011). Reprinted with permission of the publisher. EVOLVER EDITIONS promotes a new counterculture that recognizes humanity’s visionary potential and takes tangible, pragmatic steps to realize it. EVOLVER EDITIONS explores the dynamics of personal, collective, and global change from a wide range of perspectives. EVOLVER EDITIONS is an imprint of the nonprofit publishing house North Atlantic Books and is produced in collaboration with Evolver LLC, a company founded in 2007 that publishes the web magazine Reality Sandwich ( www.realitysandwich.com ), runs the social network Evolver.net ( www.evolver.net ), and recently launched a new series of live video seminars, Evolver Intensives ( www.evolverintensives.com ). Evolver also supports the Evolver Social Movement, which is building a global network of communities who collaborate, share knowledge, and engage in transformative practices. For more information, please visit www.evolvereditions.com .
